name: copilot-cost-lens
description: Track GitHub Copilot and Claude Code spend per repository — local, private, real-time. Per-repo cost breakdown, model and cache analytics, budgets and forecasts.

viewsWelcome.contents:
No Copilot usage data found yet.
Use Copilot Chat in any workspace and data will appear here automatically.
[Open Dashboard](command:copilotCostLens.openDashboard)
[Refresh](command:copilotCostLens.refresh)

enumDescriptions: Copilot Business — 1,900 AI Credits per user per month
Copilot Business promotional period (Jun–Aug 2026) — 3,000 AI Credits per user per month
Copilot Enterprise — 3,900 AI Credits per user per month
Copilot Enterprise promotional period (Jun–Aug 2026) — 7,000 AI Credits per user per month
copilotCostLens.plan.description: Your GitHub Copilot plan. Determines the included monthly AI Credits allowance used for budget gauges.

copilotCostLens.includedCreditsPerMonth.description: Included AI Credits per month (only used when plan is 'custom').

copilotCostLens.monthlyBudgetUsd.description: Optional personal monthly budget in USD (0 = disabled). You get a warning when the month-to-date spend crosses the warning threshold.

copilotCostLens.warnAtPercent.description: Warn when month-to-date usage exceeds this percentage of the included credits (or monthly budget, if set).

copilotCostLens.statusBar.enabled.description: Show month-to-date Copilot spend in the status bar.

copilotCostLens.extraStorageRoots.description: Additional VS Code 'workspaceStorage' roots to scan (absolute paths). Standard locations of VS Code, Insiders and VSCodium are detected automatically.

copilotCostLens.claudeCode.enabled.description: Include Claude Code usage (~/.claude/projects) in per-repository costs. Claude Code spend never counts against the Copilot allowance gauge.

copilotCostLens.copilotCli.enabled.description: Include GitHub Copilot CLI usage (~/.copilot/session-state) in per-repository costs.

copilotCostLens.estimation.enabled.description: When exact token usage is not available in logs, estimate token usage from chat session content. Estimated entries are clearly marked.

copilotCostLens.priceOverrides.markdownDescription: Override model pricing (USD per 1M tokens). Example: `{ "gpt-5.5": { "input": 5, "cachedInput": 0.5, "output": 30 } }`

copilotCostLens.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: How often to rescan usage logs in the background. File watchers trigger immediate refreshes on top of this.
